# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability in MemPalace.NET, please **do not** open a public GitHub issue.

Instead, please report the vulnerability responsibly by:

1. **Email**: Send a detailed report to the project maintainers (check the repository for contact information)
2. **Include**:
   - Description of the vulnerability
   - Steps to reproduce (if applicable)
   - Potential impact
   - Suggested fix (if you have one)

## Supported Versions

We currently support the following versions with security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1   | :x:                |

## Security Update Process

1. We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours
2. We will work on a fix and plan a release
3. We will release a security patch as soon as possible
4. We will credit you for the responsible disclosure (unless you prefer anonymity)

## Security Considerations

When using MemPalace.NET:

- Keep your .NET runtime updated
- Review dependencies regularly
- Report any suspicious behavior

Thank you for helping keep MemPalace.NET secure!
